---
title: "My awesome website"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
---

# This is Yuying's awesome website

![](https://media.giphy.com/media/drXGoW1iudhKw/giphy.gif)

Sometimes I use [google](https://www.google.com/) to so data science when I'm stuck.

This is a picture of me

![](image/fig.jpeg)

<img src="image/fig.jpeg" style="width:75%">.  



If you'd like to learn more about this website, visit [this page](about.htlm)
